metadata.title: Synaply - Ako te Reo me te AI & Spaced Repetition
metadata.description: Whakapiki i o pūkenga reo me te AI-powered spaced repetition. Waihanga i au ake rārangi kupu, ako rānei i ngā rārangi tūmatanui i tuarihia e te hapori.
metadata.keywords: ako reo Ingarihi, spaced repetition, kaihanga kupu, kāri uira, AI ako reo, rārangi kupu, taupānga ako reo, ako reo Pāniora, ako reo Wīwī, ako reo Tiamana, matatau reo, maumahara kupu, SRS ako
metadata.og_description: Whakapiki i o pūkenga reo me te AI-powered spaced repetition. Ako tere atu, maumahara roa atu.
metadata.og_image_alt: Synaply AI Taupānga Ako Reo Atanga
metadata.twitter_title: Synaply - Ako i ngā Kupu Hou me te ngāwari
metadata.twitter_description: Hono ki Synaply ki te whakawhānui i o kupu mā te whakamahi i te spaced repetition ataamai me te AI.

common.title: Taitara
common.no_data: Kāore he raraunga e wātea ana

dashboard.title: Paetohu
dashboard.subtitle: E ako ana i te {target} mai i te {source}
dashboard.community_lists_desc: Tirohia ngā rārangi kupu tūmatanui me ngā rārangi purei a ētahi atu kaiwhakamahi.
dashboard.ai_practice_desc: Whakapakari i o kupu mā te whakamāori i ngā rerenga kōrero i hangaia e te AI i runga i te kaupapa, i to rārangi kupu rānei.
dashboard.manage_words_desc: Tirohia, rapu, whakatika, muku rānei i ngā kupu mai i to kohinga.
dashboard.import_failed: Kāore i taea te tikiake i ngā kupu.
dashboard.import_error_retry: Kāore i taea te tiaki i to kupu hou. Me ngana anō!
dashboard.generate_word_list_error: Kāore i taea te whakaputa rārangi kupu.
dashboard.select_topic_error: Tēnā tīpakohia he kaupapa, tāuruhia rānei to ake horopaki.
dashboard.ai_translation_notice: Mā te AI koe e āwhina ki te whakamāramatanga me te rerenga kōrero tauira
dashboard.delete_confirm: E hiahia ana koe ki te muku i tēnei kupu?
dashboard.delete_all_confirm: E hiahia ana koe ki te muku i ngā kupu KATOA? Kāore e taea tēnei te whakakore.
dashboard.loading_words: E uta ana i ngā kupu...
dashboard.no_words_found: Kāore he kupu i kitea. Ngana ki tētahi atu kupu rapu, tāpirihia rānei ētahi kupu!
dashboard.no_words_for_lesson: Kāore he kupu i kitea hei ako. Tēnā tāpirihia he kupu hou ki to rārangi i te tuatahi!
dashboard.no_words_to_review: Kāore o kupu hei arotake i tēnei rā. Hoki mai ā muri ake, tāpirihia rānei he kupu hou!
dashboard.lesson_complete_desc: Mahi pai! Kua arotake koe i o kupu mō tēnei rā.
dashboard.practice_setup_desc: Tāuruhia he kaupapa hei whakaputa rerenga kōrero whakangungu māu anake!
dashboard.practice_topic_hint: Ki te waiho i te pātea, ka whakaputahia ngā rerenga kōrero i runga i o kupu ako.
dashboard.generating_sentences: E whakaputa ana i ngā rerenga kōrero...
dashboard.footer_help_text: Āwhina mai ki te whakapai ake! Tuarihia o whakaaro, ripoatahia ngā hapa, tonoa rānei he āhuatanga hou:
dashboard.support_desc: Ki te pai ki a koe tēnei taupānga, ka taea e koe te tautoko i tona whanaketanga.

onboarding.journey_begins: Ka tīmata to haerenga ki te matatau reo i konei.
onboarding.strategy_desc: Kia whai hua ai koe i Synaply, ka tūtohu mātou i tēnei rautaki ngāwari:
onboarding.step1_desc: Tāpirihia kia 100 pea ngā kupu e pā ana ki tētahi kaupapa kotahi (hei tauira, Pakihi, Haereere rānei) hei hanga horopaki pakari.
onboarding.step2_desc: Whakaakona ēnei kupu mā te tukurua o ia rā kia noho rā anō hei wāhanga o o kupu.
onboarding.step3_desc: Whakawhiti ki te Whakangungu AI ki te whakamahi i o kupu hou i roto i ngā rerenga kōrero katoa me ngā tūnga o te ao tūturu.

dashboard.generate_ai_title: Whakaputa Rārangi Kupu me te AI

dashboard.publish_desc: Tuarihia tēnei kohinga o ngā kupu {count} ki ētahi atu kaiwhakamahi. Ka kitea i roto i te whare whakaatu Rārangi Tūmatanui.
dashboard.publish_success: I whakaputa angitū te rārangi kupu!
dashboard.publish_error: Kāore i taea te whakaputa rārangi kupu.
dashboard.duplicate_word_error: Ko te kupu "{word}" kei roto kē i te rārangi
dashboard.inline_add_error: Tēnā homai te kupu taketake me te whakamāoritanga
dashboard.save_batch_success: I tiaki angitū ngā kupu {count} ki to rārangi!
dashboard.save_batch_error: Kāore i taea te tiaki i ngā kupu. Tēnā ngana anō.
dashboard.remove_duplicates_error: Tēnā mukua ngā kupu tārua i mua i te tiaki.
dashboard.remove_duplicates_publish_error: Tēnā mukua ngā kupu tārua i mua i te whakaputa.

public_lists.load_error: Kāore i taea te uta i ngā rārangi tūmatanui i tēnei wā.

profile.terms_welcome: Nau mai ki Synaply. Mā te whakamahi i ā mātou ratonga, ka whakaae koe ki ēnei tikanga...
profile.title: Whakatakotoranga Kōtaha
profile.leave_empty: Waiho kia pātea hei pupuri i te kupuhipa onāianei
profile.update_error: Kāore i taea te whakahou i te kōtaha
profile.subtitle: Whakahaerehia o mōhiohio whaiaro me o whakatakotoranga reo

register.title: Waihanga i to pūkete
register.password_hint: Me 8 neke atu rānei ngā pūāhua

help.title: Me pēhea te whakamahi i Synaply

best_practice.title: Tikanga Pai mō te Angitu
best_practice.strategy_desc: Mō te wheako ako tino whai hua, ka tūtohu mātou i tēnei rautaki 3-taahiraa ngāwari:
best_practice.step1_desc: Tāpirihia kia 100 pea ngā kupu e arotahi ana ki te kaupapa kotahi (hei tauira, Haereere, Pakihi rānei) hei hanga horopaki.
best_practice.step2_desc: Whakaakona ēnei kupu mā te tukurua o ia rā kia noho rā anō hei wāhanga o o kupu.
best_practice.step3_desc: Whakawhiti ki te Whakangungu AI ki te whakamahi i o kupu hou i roto i ngā rerenga kōrero katoa me ngā horopaki o te ao tūturu.

getting_started.title: Te Tīmatanga
getting_started.desc: He taputapu pakari a Synaply i hangaia hei āwhina i a koe ki te whakawhānui i o kupu me te whakapai ake i o pūkenga reo mā te whakamahi i te spaced repetition me te atamai hangarau.
getting_started.step1_desc: Tāpirihia ngā kupu ā-ringa, whakamahia rānei te AI ki te whakaputa rārangi mā te kaupapa me te taumata.
getting_started.step2_desc: Whakamahia te Arotake Kupu hei maumahara i ngā kupu mā te whakamahi i te algorithm FSRS.

manual.title: Tāurunga ā-Ringa
manual.desc: Tāuruhia te kupu i roto i te reo e ako ana koe me tona whakamāoritanga. Ka taea e koe te tāpiri kōrero, horopaki rānei hei awhina i te maumahara.

auto_translate.title: Whakamāori-aunoa
auto_translate.desc: Whakamahia te āhuatanga "Whakamāori-aunoa" mō te whakamāoritanga inamata mā te ratonga DeepL.

ai_list.title: Whakaputa Rārangi (Rārangi Kupu AI)
ai_list.desc: Whiriwhiria he taumata (A1-C2) me tētahi kaupapa, a, ka kohia e te AI (Gemini) he rārangi kupu whai take māu, ka taea te tāpiri ki to pātaka kupu mā te paatene kotahi.

ai_insights.title: Whakaaro AI
ai_insights.desc: Mō ia kupu, ka taea e te AI te homai kupu taurite, tauira whakamahinga, me ngā tohu wetereo.

spaced_repetition.title: Spaced Repetition
spaced_repetition.desc: Whakamahia ai e Synaply te algorithm FSRS (Free Spaced Repetition Scheduler) ki te tātai i te wā tino pai ki te tukurua i ia kupu.
spaced_repetition.step1: Ka whakaatuhia ki a koe he kupu i roto i te reo taketake.
spaced_repetition.step2: Tāuruhia te whakamāoritanga ka pēhi i te Enter, i te Tirohia te Whakahoki rānei.
spaced_repetition.step3: Ki te kore koe e maumahara — pāwhiritia te "Kāore e maumahara" kia kite i te whakahoki.
spaced_repetition.step4: Mā te algorithm e tātai anō te rā arotake panuku i runga i to whakahoki.

ai_practice.title: Whakangungu AI: Whakamāori Rerenga
ai_practice.desc: Ko tēnei āhuatanga e āwhina ana ki te whakangungu i te wetereo me te horopaki mā te whakamāori i ngā rerenga kōrero katoa i titohia e te AI mōu ake.
ai_practice.step1: Tīpakohia he kaupapa (hei tauira, "Pakihi", "Haereere") ka waiho rānei te wāhi kia pātea.
ai_practice.step2: Ka whakaputahia e te AI kia 5 ngā rerenga kōrero i runga i te kaupapa i tīpakohia.
ai_practice.step3: Tukuna to whakamāoritanga ka whiwhi i te wetewete taipitopito.
ai_practice.step4: Mā te AI e tohu ngā hapa me te tūtohu i te whakamāoritanga pai rawa me ngā whakamārama.

dictionary_management.title: Whakahaere Pātaka Kupu
dictionary_management.search: Rapu: Whakamahia te pae rapu ki te kimi tere i ngā kupu i roto i to kohinga.
dictionary_management.sorting: Kōmaka: Tirohia te rārangi o o kupu katoa me te kōwhiringa ki te muku i a rātou.
dictionary_management.delete_all: Muku i ngā kupu katoa: Te āhei ki te whakawātea i to pātaka kupu katoa mā te pāwhiri kotahi.

progress.title: Ahunga me ngā Putea
progress.desc: Ko to putea (i te upoko o te taupānga) e whakaatu ana i te maha o ngā kupu i whakamāoritia i te tika. Ko te teitei o te putea, ko te maha o ngā kupu kua ako angitū koe!
